mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user_info (user_id, nickname, weight, height, age, gender, bmi, bmr, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{nickname}, #{weight}, #{height}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{bmi}, #{bmr}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE nickname = VALUES(nickname), weight = VALUES(weight), height = VALUES(height), age = VALUES(age), gender = VALUES(gender), bmi = VALUES(bmi), bmr = VALUES(bmr), status = VALUES(status), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
mapper.select: SELECT user_id, nickname, weight, height, age, gender, bmi, bmr, status, created_at, updated_at FROM app_user_info WHERE user_id = #{userId}
